offer: For logistics managers processing 10–50 orders/month, inaccurate inventory forecasting causes stockouts. We provide an inventory forecasting system instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate inventory forecasting leads to stockouts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to logistics managers with demo video
Community forums for logistics tools sharing
try_it: Let users try manual entry for inventory data on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Develop a demo video for manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
